# kubefu_k8s_networking_k8s_io_network_policy_v1 (Data Source)

NetworkPolicy describes what network traffic is allowed for a set of Pods



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

- `metadata` (Map of String) Standard object's metadata. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/api-conventions.md#metadata
- `spec` (Map of String) Specification of the desired behavior for this NetworkPolicy.
